name: Process Baselining: Process Name
notes: Enable this rule to create a baseline of process names found in your environment.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
TD_list: APPLY Process Baselining: Process Name on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
RED_list: Add the "Process Name" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Profiled Process Names"
